content_body:
Valentine's Day is quickly approaching, and you know what that means ~ A great excuse to come up to Blue Ridge and stay in a luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental to celebrate the season of love. A dozen roses, sparkling champagne, decadent chocolates, romantic dinner for two, a cozy cabin in Blue Ridge ~ the perfect ingredients for a special Valentine's Day. Blue Ridge was most recently listed as one of the most romantic places to go for a Valentine's getaway by ExploreGeorgia.com. So let us paint a beautiful picture of what a special romantic holiday looks like in Blue Ridge as we have chosen the 5 most popular activities for lovers.

1.  Couple's Massage ~ Start your day by shedding the stresses of life with a couples massage. Enjoy the romance of a candlelight couples massage at Serenity in the Mountains or TeaTree Boutique Spas in Blue Ridge. If you would like to stay home, TeaTree Spas will come to you! You will feel happy and relaxed, ready to take on the day exploring all that Blue Ridge has to offer.

2.  Experience Blue Ridge ~ There is so much to see and do in Blue Ridge!  Spend some time exploring and experiencing Blue Ridge with the one you love. Enjoy a drive tour of the Blue Ridge Mountains where lakes and rivers decorate the landscape along with panoramic mountain vistas. Walk down Main Street and explore the shops and boutiques ~ there's something for everyone! Rejuvenate your senses as you hike to a beautiful waterfall. 

3.  Romantic Dinner ~ after all the adventure and exploration, Blue Ridge has a variety of dining options for a romantic dinner for two. For the foodie lovers, you will delight in Harvest on Main, Black Sheep, or Treo's. No matter what you're craving, you'll be sure to find it in Blue Ridge. If you'd like to stay in, our Blue Ridge cabin rentals come with fully equipped gourmet kitchens so that you can enjoy the process of preparing a delectable dinner for two with wine, candlelight and private ambiance.  

4.  Soak in the Hot Tub ~ For the ultimate in relaxation, a soak in the hot tub underneath the stars or on your private deck will certainly be pleasureable to you both.  Some of our Blue Ridge cabin rentals come with hot tubs in front of wood-burning fireplaces. Engaging in fun conversation, laughing the night away, sipping a glass of wine ~ you'll create lasting memories with your loved one.

5.  Cozy Fire ~ A perfect ending to a perfect day. There is something about sitting in front of a warm crackling fire, snuggled up in a blanket with the one you love, enjoying a glass of wine and getting closer to the one you love. Our Blue Ridge luxury cabin rentals feature beautiful stone wood-burning fireplaces in beautifully appointed living areas that are sure to please.  Such a beautiful backdrop to a romantic rendevous with your sweetheart will be sure to create memories that will last a lifetime.

A Rustic Elegance, Our True Blue, Creekside Bed, and Cherokee Sunrise  are just a few of our cozy luxury cabins that are atmospherically romantic and just the right size for a couple or even more.

Come to Blue Ridge and stay in one of our luxury Blue Ridge cabin rentals for Valentine's Day and you will rediscover that initial flame that sparked romance between the two of you.  Happy Valentine's Day!
title: 5 Romantic Things To Do in Blue Ridge for Valentine's Day
